subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! The All-Glorious hath heard thy call time and again, and hath answered thee through this sublime and wondrous Tablet, from which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل ان الجلیل سمع ندآئک مره بعد مره و اجابک بهذا اللوح العزیز البدیع الذی یجد منه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution
